title: Mango Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Mango Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Mango Hotels in Aurangabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mango Hotels:
Mango Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mango Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
